description_long: This is a cylindrical wooden barrel painted a vivid red, reinforced with thick black metal bands around its circumference. The surface shows signs of wear, with patches of paint chipping and scuff marks, suggesting it has been used or exposed to the elements. The top of the barrel features a bold black skull and crossbones symbol, while one side displays the large white letters 'TNT', indicating it is meant to represent an explosive or hazardous material container. The barrel's staves are slightly bulged at the center, giving it a classic, robust appearance. The black metal hoops are evenly spaced and tightly fitted, providing structural integrity. The overall look is stylized and eye-catching, making it suitable for urban or industrial-themed environments.
description: A red wooden barrel with black metal bands, marked with a skull and crossbones and 'TNT' lettering, showing signs of wear and use.
description_view_0: The top of the barrel is visible, displaying a large black skull and crossbones symbol on a red background.
description_view_1: The side of the barrel prominently shows the white 'TNT' lettering and part of the skull symbol, with black bands and visible wear.
description_view_2: This view highlights the red wooden surface with black bands, but without any visible text, only partial black markings.
description_view_3: The barrel's red surface and black bands are visible, with some paint wear but no clear text or symbols.
